auth.label: Access Key
auth.description: ApiFlash access key passed as the access_key query parameter. Create or copy it from your dashboard: https://apiflash.com/dashboard/access_keys

actions.name: capture_website_screenshot
actions.description: Capture a website screenshot with ApiFlash and return the generated screenshot URL.

url.description: The complete website URL to capture, including the protocol.

fresh.description: Whether ApiFlash should bypass the cache and capture a fresh screenshot.

ttl.description: The screenshot cache lifetime in seconds, from 0 to 2592000.

full_page.description: Whether to capture the entire scrollable page instead of only the viewport.

scroll_page.description: Whether ApiFlash should scroll the page before capture to trigger lazy-loaded content.

height.description: The viewport height in pixels. This is ignored when `full_page` is true.

delay.description: The delay in seconds to wait after load before capturing the screenshot.

wait_for.description: A CSS selector that must match an element before the screenshot is captured.

wait_until.description: The page load condition ApiFlash should wait for before capturing.

element.description: A CSS selector for capturing only the first matching element.

element_overlap.description: Whether to keep overlapping elements when capturing a targeted element.

quality.description: The screenshot quality between 0 and 100 for jpeg or webp output.

transparent.description: Whether to capture the screenshot with transparency enabled when using png output.

extract_html.description: Whether ApiFlash should also return a URL for the extracted HTML.

extract_text.description: Whether ApiFlash should also return a URL for the extracted plain text.

accept_language.description: The Accept-Language header value used when rendering the target page.

user_agent.description: The User-Agent string used when rendering the target page.

headers.description: A semicolon-separated header list such as `Header1=value1;Header2=value2`.

cookies.description: A semicolon-separated cookie list such as `name1=value1;name2=value2`.

fail_on_status.description: A comma-separated list or range of HTTP status codes that should fail the capture.

no_ads.description: Whether ApiFlash should block popular ad networks during capture.

no_tracking.description: Whether ApiFlash should block common tracking scripts during capture.

no_cookie_banners.description: Whether ApiFlash should hide cookie banners and popups during capture.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for capturing a website screenshot with ApiFlash.

url.description: The URL of the captured screenshot image.

extracted_html.description: The URL of the extracted HTML file when `extract_html` is enabled.

extracted_text.description: The URL of the extracted text file when `extract_text` is enabled.

limit.description: The maximum number of screenshots allowed in the billing period.

remaining.description: The number of screenshots still available in the current billing period.

reset.description: The UTC epoch second when the screenshot quota resets.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for capturing a website screenshot.

actions.name: get_quota_information
actions.description: Retrieve the current ApiFlash screenshot quota and reset time.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving the current ApiFlash quota.

limit.description: The maximum number of screenshots allowed in the billing period.

remaining.description: The number of screenshots still available in the current billing period.

reset.description: The UTC epoch second when the screenshot quota resets.

actions.name: get_screenshot_metadata
actions.description: Read HTTP metadata for a screenshot URL previously returned by ApiFlash.

url.description: The screenshot URL returned by `capture_website_screenshot` for metadata lookup.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reading screenshot metadata.

url.description: The screenshot URL that was inspected.

content_type.description: The Content-Type header returned by the screenshot URL.

content_length.description: The Content-Length header returned by the screenshot URL, in bytes.

etag.description: The ETag header returned by the screenshot URL.

last_modified.description: The Last-Modified header returned by the screenshot URL.

cache_control.description: The Cache-Control header returned by the screenshot URL.

outputSchema.description: Metadata read from a previously generated ApiFlash screenshot URL.
